About Dr. Priya Sharma

Dedicated to providing the highest quality gynecological care with compassion and expertise.

Dr. Priya Sharma
Senior Gynecologist & Obstetrician

Dr. Priya Sharma is a highly experienced gynecologist with over 15 years of practice. She is passionate about women's health and has helped thousands of patients with everything from routine checkups to complex pregnancies and fertility care.

She believes in treating every patient with empathy, listening carefully, and offering personalized, evidence-based care in a warm, comfortable environment.

Education

✓MBBS — Grant Medical College, Mumbai
✓MD (OB-GYN) — AIIMS, New Delhi
✓Fellowship in Reproductive Medicine

Experience

✓15+ years of clinical practice
✓Former consultant at Lilavati Hospital
✓5000+ successful deliveries
✓Specialized in high-risk pregnancies

Specializations

✓Pregnancy & Prenatal Care
✓PCOS / PCOD Management
✓Infertility Treatment
✓Menstrual Disorders
✓Menopause Care

Our Services

Comprehensive gynecological care tailored to every stage of your life.

🤰
Pregnancy Care
Complete prenatal and postnatal care including regular check-ups, ultrasounds, and high-risk pregnancy management.
🌸
PCOS Treatment
Diagnosis and personalized treatment for Polycystic Ovary Syndrome with lifestyle and medical care.
👶
Infertility Consultation
Expert guidance and treatment for couples struggling with infertility, including IUI and IVF referrals.
🩸
Menstrual Disorder Treatment
Treatment for irregular periods, heavy bleeding, painful cycles, and related hormonal issues.
🌷
Menopause Care
Support and management of menopause symptoms with hormone therapy and lifestyle counselling.
🩺
Women's Health Checkup
Comprehensive preventive health checkups including Pap smear, breast exams, and screenings.

Not sure which service you need?

Book a consultation and we'll guide you to the right care.
